structure.layout/: Base theme structure — theme.liquid is root template
structure.sections/: Reusable configurable components for theme editor (.liquid = renderable, .json = section groups)
structure.snippets/: Smaller reusable Liquid components (not directly theme-editor configurable)
structure.config/settings_schema.json: Theme-wide settings for Shopify admin (currently empty array [])
structure.tools/catalog-generator/: Node.js scripts for generating product catalog demo data
structure..claude/: AI agent commands, hooks, and project management tooling

javascript.pattern: Vanilla Web Components (HTMLElement subclasses) — no framework dependencies
coreFiles: assets/global.js — all custom element definitions (306 lines)
assets/pubsub.js — simple pub/sub system for component communication (25 lines)
assets/constants.js — shared constants and event names (10 lines)
customElements: product-gallery — image gallery with thumbnail navigation
add-to-cart-button — cart addition with loading/success/error states
cart-drawer — slide-out cart panel with Shopify section refresh
header-cart — cart count badge in header
variant-selector — product variant selection and price updates

events.cart:updated: Fired on add-to-cart success; triggers cart-drawer refresh and header-cart count update

css.mainFile: assets/base.css (549 lines) — global styles, CSS custom properties, typography, layout primitives

designPatterns.buttons: Orange border with transparent bg; flip to solid orange on hover — instant transition (no easing, 'mechanical' feel)
designPatterns.badges: Small uppercase labels for product status (RESTOCKED, NEW, etc.)
designPatterns.grid: Visible grid lines (border: var(--grid-gap) solid var(--c-border)) — blueprint/schematic aesthetic
designPatterns.images: filter: grayscale(1) default; color revealed on hover (:hover { filter: none })
designPatterns.sectionScoping: Per-section CSS variables via {%- style -%} #shopify-section-{{ section.id }} { ... } pattern
designPatterns.containerQueries: Used in smart-grid.liquid and container-grid.liquid for responsive layout without media queries

cicd.preCommit: Husky + lint-staged: ESLint --fix + Prettier --write on staged .js/.json/.css/.md files
cicd.prePush: pnpm validate (lint + format:check + shopify theme check) — rejects push on failure

githubActions.ci.yml: Runs on push/PR to main, dev, development — validates ESLint, Prettier, theme check, JSON validity
githubActions.deploy-production.yml: Manual workflow_dispatch — merges dev into main, creates deployment tag, optional Shopify push (requires typing DEPLOY to confirm)

rules: JSDoc required on all function declarations, methods, class declarations (@param types, @returns type)
No console.log — only console.warn and console.error
Curly braces required on all control flow

prettier.rules: Single quotes, semicolons, 2-space indent, 100 char print width, trailing commas (es5), CSS files use double quotes
